subcodes.first_line: O Abu-Talib! The Wronged One declareth: Praise be to God that thou hast attained unto that which is the source of honor in all [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ابا طالب مظلوم میفرماید الحمد لله فائز شدی بانچه که سبب عزت شماست در جمیع
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @consolation and comfort, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
